title: Adding numerical id to a board
excerpt: I want to add an automatic number (ID) to a new board when it is created to give it a job number. This will go up increamentally every new board that is added and can be search like a job numbering system.

posts.author: Matty1 (Matthew)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to add an automatic number (ID) to a new board when it is created to give it a job number. This will go up increamentally every new board that is added and can be search like a job numbering system.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
